method: COMMENT_EVALUATION batch 5 — close the 17 open target=D cluster_observations (Session D moot; researcher principle: every pointer/observation closes at completion). Cross-register flags + structural notes confirmed as standing observational findings (most already actioned via this session's routing). 276 OT/NT atonement: covered by M38 finding 21142; M11 cross-cluster integration queued as a reciprocal.

new_flags.description: From M38 obs 276 (OT/NT atonement transformation). M11 (Repentance/Forgiveness/Restoration) previously analysed atonement in the forgiveness context (kipper/salach Levitical pair; NT aphiemi). When M11 is analysed, integrate its atonement findings with M38's atonement typology — M38 char 125/126, finding 21142 (Levitical type -> christological antitype -> eschatological telos). The OT->NT transformation question (was deferred to Session D, now moot) is substantially covered in M38 21142; this carries the M11 integration.
